The '''Kol Huro Unrest''' was an event that occurred in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the end of the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]].

==The conflict==
The minor rebellion known as the Kol Huro Unrest occurred [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]] during the year [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> Under the influence of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]],<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the [[Kol Huro system/Legends|Kol Huro]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Mustag Olus]] created an intimidating army of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]<ref name="EGW" /> using the factories of Kol Huro.<ref name="NEC" /> Under his control, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] army proceeded to conquer [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in neighboring [[Realspace/Legends|space]]<ref name="NEGDxvi" /> before [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] defeated his nascent empire.<ref name="EGW" /> [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] support was crucial to the victory, as no military forces that were capable of facing Olus's droids were available.<ref name="EA" />

==Aftermath==
The Kol Huro Unrest confused [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]], as there was no apparent logic to the variety of mechanical enemies the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had faced during the short-lived uprising, and the war was eventually revealed to be an experiment in mechanized warfare.<ref name="EGW" /> The Unrest rendered the Kol Huro locals wary of droids, making it nearly impossible for [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] or [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] to establish a presence in the region.<ref name="NEGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

After the Unrest, many of the dictator's weapons (such as the [[Kol Huro combat droid]]) were sold offworld, and the conflict convinced the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] in the wisdom of increasing their own droid security forces.
